mapper.select: SELECT conversation_id, MIN(timestamp) as created_at, MAX(timestamp) as last_message_at, COUNT(*) as message_count FROM spring_ai_chat_memory GROUP BY conversation_id ORDER BY last_message_at DESC
SELECT content, type, timestamp FROM spring_ai_chat_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} ORDER BY timestamp ASC
SELECT content FROM spring_ai_chat_memory WHERE conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND type = 'user' ORDER BY timestamp ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO spring_ai_chat_memory (conversation_id, content, type, agent_name, timestamp) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{content}, #{role}, #{agentName}, NOW())
